channel.title: Najmush Saaquib — Blog
channel.description: Writing on distributed systems, backend engineering, and software craft.

item.title: Your Extension Works Locally. Now Ship It to 3 Billion Chrome Users.
item.description: The complete, step-by-step guide to publishing your browser extension on the Chrome Web Store — from developer registration to your first real users.

item.title: I Built a Chrome Extension in a Weekend. Here's Exactly How You Can Too.
item.description: A practical, no-fluff guide to building your first browser extension — from zero to a working product you can actually use.
